arabicText: وَكُلُّ مَا جَاءَ فِي الْقُرْآنِ وَالْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ فَمَقْبُولٌ وَاجِبُ التَّصْدِيقِ
latinTransliteration: Wa kullu mā jā'a fil-Qur'āni wal-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati fa-maqbūlun wājibut-taṣdīq
englishTranslation: And everything that has come in the Quran and authentic narrations is accepted and must be believed.
wolofTranslationStandard: Bépp mbir bu ñëwé ci Alxuraan ak ci xabar yu dëggu dañu koy nangu te dëggal ko.
wolofalAjamiScript: بِيقْ مْبِرْ بُ نْيِوِ سِ اَلْخُرَانْ اَكْ سِ خَبَرْ يُ دِࣺجُّ دَنْيُ كُيْ نَنْجُ تِ دِࣺجَّلْ كُ

arabicText: مِنْ رُؤْيَةِ الرَّحْمَنِ فِي الْجِنَانِ وَالْحِسَابِ وَالْمِيزَانِ يَوْمَ الدِّينِ
latinTransliteration: Min ru'yatir-Raḥmāni fil-jināni wal-ḥisābi wal-mīzāni yawmid-dīn
englishTranslation: Such as the vision of the All-Merciful in Paradise, the reckoning, and the scale on the Day of Judgment.
wolofTranslationStandard: Niki guis sa Boroom ca àjjana, saytu jëf yi ak miiñaan ca bisu àllaxira.
wolofalAjamiScript: نِكِ جِسْ سَ بُرُومْ سَ اَجَّنَ سَيْتُ جِࣺفْ يِ اَكْ مِينْجَانْ سَ بِسُ اَلَّخِرَ

arabicText: وَأَنَّهُ تَعَالَى لَيْسَ جِسْمًا وَلَا فِي جِهَةٍ مِنَ الْجِهَاتِ السِّتِّ
latinTransliteration: Wa annahu ta‘ālā laysa jisman wa lā fī jihatin minal-jihātis-sitt
englishTranslation: And that He, Exalted is He, is not a physical body, nor is He in any of the six directions.
wolofTranslationStandard: Te xame ko ne Yàlla du jëmm, te nekkul ci benn ci juróom-benn bërëb yi.
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ خَمِ كُ نِ يَٚlَّ دُ جِمْ تِ نِكُّلْ سِ بِنِّ سِ جُرُومْ بِنِّ بِرِٜbْ يِ

arabicText: فَهُوَ الْقَدِيمُ الْبَاقِي بِلَا بَدَاءٍ وَلَا فَنَاءٍ لَهُ صُبْحَانَهُ وَتَعَالَى
latinTransliteration: Fahuwal-Qadīmul-Bāqī bilā badā'in wa lā fanā'in lahu subḥānahu wa ta‘ālā
englishTranslation: For He is the Eternally Pre-existent, the Abiding, without beginning or end, glorified and exalted is He.
wolofTranslationStandard: Moom la Ku jëkk ki, Ku yàgg ki, andul ak dore walla jex, sell na te kawe.
wolofalAjamiScript: مُومْ لَ كُ جِࣺكْ كِ كُ يَقْ كِ اَنْدُلْ اَكْ دُرِ وَلَّ جِخْ سِلْ نَ تِ كَوِ

arabicText: وَكُلُّ مَا جَاءَ فِي الْقُرْآنِ وَالْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ فَمَقْبُولٌ وَاجِبُ التَّصْدِيقِ [5]
latinTransliteration: Wa kullu mā jā'a fil-Qur'āni wal-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati fa-maqbūlun wājibut-taṣdīq (5)
englishTranslation: And everything that has come in the Quran and authentic narrations is accepted and must be believed. (Stanza 5)
wolofTranslationStandard: Bépp mbir bu ñëwé ci Alxuraan ak ci xabar yu dëggu dañu koy nangu te dëggal ko. (Wers 5)
wolofalAjamiScript: بِيقْ مْبِرْ بُ نْيِوِ سِ اَلْخُرَانْ اَكْ سِ خَبَرْ يُ دِࣺجُّ دَنْيُ كُيْ نَنْجُ تِ دِࣺجَّلْ كُ [5]

arabicText: مِنْ رُؤْيَةِ الرَّحْمَنِ فِي الْجِنَانِ وَالْحِسَابِ وَالْمِيزَانِ يَوْمَ الدِّينِ [6]
latinTransliteration: Min ru'yatir-Raḥmāni fil-jināni wal-ḥisābi wal-mīzāni yawmid-dīn (6)
englishTranslation: Such as the vision of the All-Merciful in Paradise, the reckoning, and the scale on the Day of Judgment. (Stanza 6)
wolofTranslationStandard: Niki guis sa Boroom ca àjjana, saytu jëf yi ak miiñaan ca bisu àllaxira. (Wers 6)
wolofalAjamiScript: نِكِ جِسْ سَ بُرُومْ سَ اَجَّنَ سَيْتُ جِࣺفْ يِ اَكْ مِينْجَانْ سَ بِسُ اَلَّخِرَ [6]

latinTransliteration: Wa annahu ta‘ālā laysa jisman wa lā fī jihatin minal-jihātis-sitt (7)
englishTranslation: And that He, Exalted is He, is not a physical body, nor is He in any of the six directions. (Stanza 7)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te xame ko ne Yàlla du jëmm, te nekkul ci benn ci juróom-benn bërëb yi. (Wers 7)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ خَمِ كُ نِ يَٚlَّ دُ جِمْ تِ نِكُّلْ سِ بِنِّ سِ جُرُومْ بِنِّ بِرِٜbْ يِ [7]

arabicText: فَهُوَ الْقَدِيمُ الْبَاقِي بِلَا بَدَاءٍ وَلَا فَنَاءٍ لَهُ صُبْحَانَهُ وَتَعَالَى [8]
latinTransliteration: Fahuwal-Qadīmul-Bāqī bilā badā'in wa lā fanā'in lahu subḥānahu wa ta‘ālā (8)
englishTranslation: For He is the Eternally Pre-existent, the Abiding, without beginning or end, glorified and exalted is He. (Stanza 8)
wolofTranslationStandard: Moom la Ku jëkk ki, Ku yàgg ki, andul ak dore walla jex, sell na te kawe. (Wers 8)
wolofalAjamiScript: مُومْ لَ كُ جِࣺكْ كِ كُ يَقْ كِ اَنْدُلْ اَكْ دُرِ وَلَّ جِخْ سِلْ نَ تِ كَوِ [8]

arabicText: وَكُلُّ مَا جَاءَ فِي الْقُرْآنِ وَالْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ فَمَقْبُولٌ وَاجِبُ التَّصْدِيقِ [25]
latinTransliteration: Wa kullu mā jā'a fil-Qur'āni wal-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati fa-maqbūlun wājibut-taṣdīq (25)
englishTranslation: And everything that has come in the Quran and authentic narrations is accepted and must be believed. (Stanza 25)
wolofTranslationStandard: Bépp mbir bu ñëwé ci Alxuraan ak ci xabar yu dëggu dañu koy nangu te dëggal ko. (Wers 25)
wolofalAjamiScript: بِيقْ مْبِرْ بُ نْيِوِ سِ اَلْخُرَانْ اَكْ سِ خَبَرْ يُ دِࣺجُّ دَنْيُ كُيْ نَنْجُ تِ دِࣺجَّلْ كُ [25]

arabicText: مِنْ رُؤْيَةِ الرَّحْمَنِ فِي الْجِنَانِ وَالْحِسَابِ وَالْمِيزَانِ يَوْمَ الدِّينِ [26]
latinTransliteration: Min ru'yatir-Raḥmāni fil-jināni wal-ḥisābi wal-mīzāni yawmid-dīn (26)
englishTranslation: Such as the vision of the All-Merciful in Paradise, the reckoning, and the scale on the Day of Judgment. (Stanza 26)
wolofTranslationStandard: Niki guis sa Boroom ca àjjana, saytu jëf yi ak miiñaan ca bisu àllaxira. (Wers 26)
